title: Byron Nash Renal Medullary Carcinoma Awareness Act of 2023
short_title: Byron Nash Renal Medullary Carcinoma Awareness Act of 2023
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
crs_summary: Byron Nash Renal Medullary Carcinoma Awareness Act of 2023 [ sic ] This bill allows states to receive federal payment under Medicaid for 50% of their costs for providing education on the risk of renal medullary carcinoma to individuals with sickle cell disease. (Renal medullary carcinoma is a rare kidney disease usually found in individuals with the sickle cell trait.)
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
